title: Cortez's Create
description: Cortez's Create is a Minecraft 1.20.1 modpack focused on automation, engineering, and creativity, built around the Create Mod and its expansions like Create: New Age and Create New Villagers. Developed by the creator of Relight Client, this modpack offers
body:
⚙️ Cortez's Create - A 1.20.1 Modpack ⚙️

From the developer of Relight Client comes Cortez's Create, a Minecraft 1.20.1 modpack built for those who love automation, engineering, and high-performance gameplay!

🔧 Powered by Create! – Featuring the Create Mod, Create: New Age, Create New Villagers, and more, this pack expands your ability to build advanced machines, intricate factories, and automated transport systems.

🚀 Optimized for Performance! – With Sodium included, enjoy smooth, high-FPS gameplay even in massive contraptions.

🏗️ Enhanced Villagers & Trading! – Meet new Create-themed villagers offering unique trades and resources for your builds.

🔩 Designed for Builders & Tinkerers! – Whether you're designing massive industrial zones or experimenting with mechanical automation, this modpack is the perfect playground for your creativity.

Download Cortez's Create now and start engineering your world like never before!
